     The Numbers Business Report

I Love You, Phillip Morris (2010)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $2,037,459Details
International Box Office $20,976,568
Worldwide Box Office $23,014,027
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Steven Russell leads a seemingly average life - an organ player in the local church, happily married to Debbie, and a member of the local police force. That is until he has a severe car accident that leads him to the ultimate epiphany: he's gay and he's going to live life to the fullest - even if he has to break the law to do it. Taking on an extravagant lifestyle, Steven turns to cons and fraud to make ends meet and is eventually sent to the State Penitentiary where he meets the love of his life, a sensitive, soft-spoken man named Phillip Morris. His devotion to freeing Phillip from jail and building the perfect life together prompts him to attempt (and often succeed at) one impossible con after another. Told with an uncanny sense of humor and a lot of heart, "I Love You Phillip Morris" is an oddball tale of what can happen when the legal system, a daredevil spirit and undying love collide.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$112,712 (5.5% of total gross)
Legs:9.38 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:8.9% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$13,000,000 (worldwide box office is 1.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:7 opening theaters/100 max. theaters, 7.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $3,080,298

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 3rd, 2010 (Limited) by Roadside Attractions, released as I Love You Phillip Morris
Video Release: April 5th, 2011 by Lionsgate Home Entertainment, released as I Love You Phillip Morris
MPA Rating: R for sexual content including strong dialogue, and language
Running Time: 100 minutes
Cast, crew, or production detail: Epilogue, Intertitle, Voiceover/Narration
Plot point: Confidence Men, Escape, LGBTQ+, Life on the Outside, Non-Chronological, Prison, Romance, Terminal Illness
Source:Based on Real Life Events
Genre:Comedy
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: EuropaCorp
Production Countries: France, United States
Languages: English

  • Box Office
  • Full Financials

Synopsis

Steven Russell leads a seemingly average life - an organ player in the local church, happily married to Debbie, and a member of the local police force. That is until he has a severe car accident that leads him to the ultimate epiphany: he's gay and he's going to live life to the fullest - even if he has to break the law to do it. Taking on an extravagant lifestyle, Steven turns to cons and fraud to make ends meet and is eventually sent to the State Penitentiary where he meets the love of his life, a sensitive, soft-spoken man named Phillip Morris. His devotion to freeing Phillip from jail and building the perfect life together prompts him to attempt (and often succeed at) one impossible con after another. Told with an uncanny sense of humor and a lot of heart, "I Love You Phillip Morris" is an oddball tale of what can happen when the legal system, a daredevil spirit and undying love collide.
